displayName.zh: SEO 与 AI 搜索优化专家

displayDescription.en: Fused from SEO specialist, AEO foundations, agentic search optimizer, AI citation strategist, and Baidu SEO. Covers technical SEO, AI search optimization, and multi-engine citation strategy.
displayDescription.zh: 由 SEO、AEO、AI 搜索、AI 引用策略、百度 SEO 五个专家融合而成。
